results.user_prompt: To streamline our engineering planning inside the 'TechCorp Solutions Team', we're phasing out one of our old spaces. Before we start setting up the new workflow, first locate the External Partners Hub channel and archive it so it no longer appears in our active view. Once that outdated channel is retired, we need a new planning area: create a private channel called Backend Q2 2026 Planning under the same team. After the channel is created, ensure that I (James Wilson), Bob Smith, and Nathan Richards are all added as members so we can begin coordinating drafts and early preparation work. Next, establish a teamwork tag named Backend Q2 Core Group, and place the same three of us into that tag so we can be mentioned together during the review cycles. After the tag is ready, update the description of the new channel to include the phrase Backend Q2 Core Group for structured planning so anyone landing there understands its purpose. Finally, post a kickoff message inside the new channel that says Welcome to Backend Q2 2026 Planning! Let's align early and execute smoothly this quarter.

Please set up a webinar for me (james.wilson@techcorp.com) on October 27, 2025, from 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM UTC. Name it 'Workplace communication' and include a short description explaining that it's about improving effective communication in the workplace. Make it open to everyone. Add the other owner of the TechCorp Solutions Team, Alice Johnson, as a co-organizer. Please publish the webinar after creation. Once created, send me a confirmation by posting a plaintext message in the General channel of the TechCorp Solutions Team with the webinar details including the name, date, time, and co-organizer information.

verifiers.name: Check Webinar Created with Correct Details
Check Alice Johnson Added as Co-Organizer
Check Confirmation Message Posted in General Channel
